title: New ClawHub skill: prompt-templates-cli — ship consistent agent instructions
content:
Loads a templates.json catalog, fills {{var}} placeholders via --set, prints the rendered prompt. Stop prompt drift. Stdlib, offline.

  python prompt_templates_cli.py render code-review --set role=senior --set tone=strict

Free + MIT. Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee. ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/prompt-templates-cli
